# setup
```{r}
library(mgcv)
library(gratia)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(marea)
```

```{r}
# get data
data("eco_indicators")

nafo_ei_4X<-eco_indicators[eco_indicators@data$region=="4X"]

nafo_pres_4X<-nafo_ei_4X@data |> 
    select(landall=landings_ALL_value, 
           landforage=landings_FORAGE.L_value,
           fpall=FP_ALL_value,
           fpgadoids=FP_GADOIDS_value #no spaces or underscores!
           )
#remove weird 2021 fpall value >3
nafo_pres_4X[52,"fpall"]<-NA

nafo_ind_4X<-nafo_ei_4X@data |> 
    select(margalefrichness=MargalefRichness_ALL_value,
           heips=Heips_ALL_value,
           lfi=LargeFishIndicator_value,
           mla=MeanLengthABUNDANCE_value,
           biomasspiscivore=BIOMASS_PISCIVORE_value
           )

```
# set region
```{r}
#more for saving options
region<-"4X"

```

# Step 1. Fit GLM GAM threshold GAM with grid search for c
```{r}
# ---- Step 1: Fit GLM, GAM, and threshold GAM with consistent settings 

# Consistent fitting options across all models
fit_method <- "REML"
use_select <- TRUE     # apply the same shrinkage to all contenders
gamma_val  <- 1.4      # conservative penalty (apply to all models)

# Helper: fit a threshold GAM with a hinge term and grid-search for c
fit_threshold_gam <- function(df, resp, pres,
                              family = tw(),
                              method = fit_method,
                              select = use_select,
                              gamma = gamma_val,
                              k_main = NULL, k_hinge = NULL,
                              probs_grid = seq(0.15, 0.85, by = 0.02),
                              min_per_side = 6) {
  n <- nrow(df)
  if (is.null(k_main))  k_main  <- max(5, min(10, floor(n / 4)))
  if (is.null(k_hinge)) k_hinge <- max(5, min(10, floor(n / 4)))
  
  x <- df[[pres]]
  y <- df[[resp]]
  
  # Candidate thresholds from central quantiles; ensure enough data on both sides
  cands <- unique(quantile(x, probs = probs_grid, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE))
  cands <- cands[is.finite(cands)]
  cands <- cands[vapply(cands, function(c0) {
    sum(x <= c0, na.rm = TRUE) >= min_per_side && sum(x > c0, na.rm = TRUE) >= min_per_side
  }, logical(1))]
  
  if (length(cands) == 0L) return(NULL)
  
  best <- NULL
  best_score <- Inf
  best_c <- NA_real_
  
  for (c0 in cands) {
    df$hinge <- pmax(0, df[[pres]] - c0)
    # Continuous kink: y ~ s(x) + s(hinge)
    fml <- as.formula(paste0(resp, " ~ s(", pres, ", k=", k_main, ") + s(hinge, k=", k_hinge, ")"))
    
    fit <- try(
      gam(fml, data = df, family = family, method = method, select = select, gamma = gamma),
      silent = TRUE
    )
    if (inherits(fit, "try-error")) next
    
    score <- fit$gcv.ubre
    if (!is.finite(score)) next
    
    if (score < best_score) {
      best <- fit
      best_score <- score
      best_c <- c0
    }
  }
  
  if (is.null(best)) return(NULL)
  attr(best, "threshold") <- best_c
  best
}

# Identify indicator and pressure tables
indicators <- nafo_ind_4X
pressures  <- nafo_pres_4X

model_list <- list()

for (a_col in names(indicators)) {         # Indicator variables (responses)
  for (b_col in names(pressures)) {        # Pressure variables (predictors)
    tryCatch({
      df <- data.frame(
        resp = indicators[[a_col]],
        pres = pressures[[b_col]]
      )
      colnames(df) <- c(a_col, b_col)
      df <- na.omit(df)
      
      # Only fit if sufficient data and nonzero variance
      if (nrow(df) < 10 || var(df[[b_col]]) == 0 || var(df[[a_col]]) == 0) next
      
      # GAM
      gam_formula <- as.formula(paste(a_col, "~ s(", b_col, ")"))
      gam_model <- gam(
        gam_formula, data = df, method = fit_method, family = tw(),
        select = use_select, gamma = gamma_val
      )
      
      # GLM (fit with gam() engine for consistency)
      glm_formula <- as.formula(paste(a_col, "~", b_col))
      glm_model <- gam(
        glm_formula, data = df, method = fit_method, family = tw(),
        select = use_select, gamma = gamma_val
      )
      
      # tGAM via grid search
      tgam_model <- fit_threshold_gam(
        df = df, resp = a_col, pres = b_col,
        family = tw(), method = fit_method, select = use_select, gamma = gamma_val
      )
      
      # Store models
      base <- paste(a_col, b_col, sep = "_vs_")
      model_list[[paste0(base, "_GAM")]]  <- gam_model
      model_list[[paste0(base, "_GLM")]]  <- glm_model
      if (!is.null(tgam_model)) {
        model_list[[paste0(base, "_TGAM")]] <- tgam_model
      }
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("Error fitting models for ", a_col, " vs ", b_col, ": ", e$message)
    })
  }
}

```

#Step 2. Extract diagonstics (tGAM)
```{r}
comparison_results <- data.frame()

for (model_name in names(model_list)) {
  tryCatch({
    model <- model_list[[model_name]]
    smry  <- summary(model)
    
    # Parse names
    parts <- strsplit(model_name, "_vs_")[[1]]
    response <- parts[1]
    predictor_and_type <- parts[2]
    predictor <- sub("_.*$", "", predictor_and_type)
    model_type <- sub("^.*_", "", predictor_and_type)
    
    # Extract diagnostics
    aic_val   <- AIC(model)
    r_squared <- smry$r.sq
    gcv_ubre  <- model$gcv.ubre
    # sum of edf across smooths if present
    edf_total <- tryCatch({
      if (!is.null(smry$s.table)) {
        sum(smry$s.table[, "edf"], na.rm = TRUE)
      } else if (!is.null(model$edf)) {
        sum(model$edf, na.rm = TRUE)
      } else NA_real_
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_)
    
    # p-value: for GAM use the smooth p-value; for GLM use parametric
    p_value <- tryCatch({
      if (model_type == "GAM") {
        smry$s.table[1, "p-value"]
      } else if (model_type == "GLM") {
        # try to use predictor row
        if (predictor %in% rownames(smry$p.table)) {
          smry$p.table[predictor, "Pr(>|t|)"]
        } else {
          smry$p.table[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]
        }
      } else if (model_type == "TGAM") {
        # Prefer the hinge term's p-value if available
        if (!is.null(smry$s.table) && "s(hinge)" %in% rownames(smry$s.table)) {
          smry$s.table["s(hinge)", "p-value"]
        } else if (!is.null(smry$s.table)) {
          # fallback to max significance among smooths
          min(smry$s.table[, "p-value"], na.rm = TRUE)
        } else NA
      } else NA
    }, error = function(e) NA)
    
    threshold <- if (model_type == "TGAM") attr(model, "threshold") else NA_real_
    
    comparison_results <- rbind(
      comparison_results,
      data.frame(
        Response   = response,
        Predictor  = predictor,
        Model_Type = model_type,
        AIC        = aic_val,
        R_squared  = r_squared,
        EDF        = edf_total,
        GCV_UBRE   = gcv_ubre,
        p_value    = p_value,
        Threshold  = threshold,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("Error extracting diagnostics for ", model_name, ": ", e$message)
  })
}

print(comparison_results)

```

# Step 3. Model Selection
```{r}
# ---- Step 3: Selection where GAM wins only if tGAM hinge is NOT significant AND tGAM is NOT within REML tolerance ----
library(dplyr)

# Tunable parameters
tolerance <- 0.01  # 1% tolerance on GCV_UBRE (REML objective)
alpha     <- 0.08  # significance level for the hinge term

model_selection <- comparison_results %>%
  # Consider only the candidate model types
  filter(Model_Type %in% c("GLM", "GAM", "TGAM")) %>%
  group_by(Response, Predictor) %>%
  # Compute best non-TGAM score (GAM or GLM)
  mutate(
    best_non_tgam_gcv   = suppressWarnings(min(GCV_UBRE[Model_Type != "TGAM"], na.rm = TRUE)),
    best_non_tgam_aic   = suppressWarnings(min(AIC[Model_Type != "TGAM"], na.rm = TRUE)),
    # Identify the row of the TGAM (if any) to use its stats in the rule
    tgam_gcv            = ifelse(Model_Type == "TGAM", GCV_UBRE, NA_real_),
    tgam_p              = ifelse(Model_Type == "TGAM", p_value, NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  # Broadcast tGAM stats to all rows in the group (for decision logic)
  mutate(
    tgam_exists         = any(Model_Type == "TGAM"),
    tgam_gcv_any        = suppressWarnings(min(tgam_gcv, na.rm = TRUE)),
    tgam_p_any          = suppressWarnings(min(tgam_p,  na.rm = TRUE)),  # min to pass through single value
    # Is tGAM within tolerance of the best non-tGAM?
    tgam_within_tol     = ifelse(is.finite(best_non_tgam_gcv) & is.finite(tgam_gcv_any),
                                 tgam_gcv_any <= best_non_tgam_gcv * (1 + tolerance),
                                 FALSE),
    # Is hinge significant?
    tgam_hinge_sig      = ifelse(is.finite(tgam_p_any), tgam_p_any < alpha, FALSE),

    # Decision priority flag:
    # Prefer TGAM if it exists AND (hinge significant OR within tolerance)
    prefer_tgam         = tgam_exists & (tgam_hinge_sig | tgam_within_tol)
  ) %>%
  # Now rank within each Response-Predictor group:
  # 1) If prefer_tgam == TRUE, pick TGAM with best GCV_UBRE
  # 2) Else (prefer_tgam == FALSE), pick absolute best by GCV_UBRE
  arrange(
    # Put preferred type first
    desc(prefer_tgam & Model_Type == "TGAM"),
    # Then rank by objective
    GCV_UBRE,
    AIC
  ) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

print(model_selection)

# 
# model_selection <- comparison_results %>%
#   filter(Model_Type %in% c("GLM", "GAM", "TGAM")) %>%
#   group_by(Response, Predictor) %>%
#   arrange(GCV_UBRE) %>%
#   slice(1) %>%
#   ungroup()
# 
# print(model_selection)
# # ---- Build and save threshold results table ----
# 
# # Helper: collapse multiple crossings into a single string
# collapse_crossings <- function(model_key, crossings_df) {
#   if (is.null(crossings_df) || nrow(crossings_df) == 0) return(NA_character_)
#   vals <- crossings_df$Predictor_Zero_Crossing[crossings_df$Model == model_key]
#   if (length(vals) == 0) return(NA_character_)
#   paste(signif(vals, 4), collapse = ", ")
# }
# 
# # Compose table of best models (+ thresholds/crossings)
# best_models_table <- model_selection %>%
#   rowwise() %>%
#   mutate(
#     # Build the model key used in model_list
#     Model_Key = paste0(Response, "_vs_", Predictor, "_", Model_Type),
#     # Bring in threshold if TGAM
#     Threshold = if (Model_Type == "TGAM") {
#       thr <- try(attr(model_list[[Model_Key]], "threshold"), silent = TRUE)
#       if (inherits(thr, "try-error")) NA_real_ else as.numeric(thr)
#     } else NA_real_,
#     # Gather derivative zero-crossings if GAM
#     Derivative_Zero_Crossings = if (Model_Type == "GAM") {
#       collapse_crossings(Model_Key, crossings_df)
#     } else NA_character_
#   ) %>%
#   ungroup() %>%
#   # Reorder and clean columns
#   select(
#     Response, Predictor, Model_Type,
#     AIC, R_squared, EDF, GCV_UBRE, p_value,
#     Threshold, Derivative_Zero_Crossings
#   ) %>%
#   arrange(Response, Predictor)
# 
# # Optional: attach a region label if you have one
# if (!exists("region")) region <- "unknown"
# 
# # Inspect in console
# print(best_models_table)


```

# Step 4. Zero crossings for GAMs and threshold extraction for tGAMs

```{r}
# ---- Step 4: Robust GAM derivative zero-crossings + tGAM threshold extraction (patched) ----
library(gratia)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)

# Helper: get a column by candidate names (for cross-version compatibility)
get_col <- function(df, candidates) {
  for (nm in candidates) {
    if (nm %in% names(df)) return(df[[nm]])
  }
  stop("None of the candidate columns found: ", paste(candidates, collapse = ", "))
}

# Robust zero-crossing function for GAMs:
# - builds newdata grid so predictor column is present
# - uses CI on derivative
# - finds transitions only between significant + and -
robust_gam_crossings <- function(model, predictor, n = 300) {
  # Guard: predictor must be in model frame
  if (!predictor %in% names(model$model)) return(NULL)
  
  x_min <- min(model$model[[predictor]], na.rm = TRUE)
  x_max <- max(model$model[[predictor]], na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(x_min) || !is.finite(x_max) || x_min == x_max) return(NULL)
  
  nd <- setNames(data.frame(seq(x_min, x_max, length.out = n)), predictor)
  
  # Compute first derivative WITH CI on the link scale and guaranteed predictor column
  deriv <- try(
    derivatives(
      model,
      term = paste0("s(", predictor, ")"),
      order = 1,
      type = "link",
      interval = "confidence",
      n = n,
      newdata = nd,
      partial_match = TRUE
    ),
    silent = TRUE
  )
  if (inherits(deriv, "try-error")) return(NULL)
  
  # Extract columns robustly
  x     <- get_col(deriv, c(predictor))                      # predictor column guaranteed by newdata
  d     <- get_col(deriv, c(".derivative", "derivative"))    # derivative column name varies by gratia
  lower <- get_col(deriv, c("lower", "lower_ci"))
  upper <- get_col(deriv, c("upper", "upper_ci"))
  
  # Classify derivative significance
  sig_class <- ifelse(lower > 0,  1L,
               ifelse(upper < 0, -1L, 0L))
  
  # Look for transitions between significant regions only
  idx <- which(diff(sig_class) != 0 &
               sig_class[-length(sig_class)] != 0 &
               sig_class[-1] != 0)
  if (length(idx) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  # Linear interpolation of the zero of d between x[i] and x[i+1]
  crossings <- map_dbl(idx, function(i) {
    x1 <- x[i];   x2 <- x[i + 1]
    d1 <- d[i];   d2 <- d[i + 1]
    if (!is.finite(d2 - d1) || (d2 - d1) == 0) return(NA_real_)
    x1 - d1 * (x2 - x1) / (d2 - d1)
  })
  crossings <- crossings[is.finite(crossings)]
  if (length(crossings) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  tibble(
    Crossing_Index = seq_along(crossings),
    Derivative_Zero_Crossing = crossings
  )
}

# Containers
gam_crossings_list <- list()
tgam_threshold_list <- list()

# Iterate through models
for (model_name in names(model_list)) {
  model <- model_list[[model_name]]
  # Defensive: skip if not a gam object
  if (!inherits(model, "gam")) next
  
  # Parse names
  parts <- strsplit(model_name, "_vs_")[[1]]
  response <- parts[1]
  predictor_and_type <- parts[2]
  predictor <- sub("_.*$", "", predictor_and_type)
  model_type <- sub("^.*_", "", predictor_and_type)
  
  # --- A) TGAM: extract threshold
  if (identical(model_type, "TGAM")) {
    thr <- attr(model, "threshold")
    if (!is.null(thr) && is.finite(thr)) {
      tgam_threshold_list[[model_name]] <- tibble(
        Model = model_name,
        Response = response,
        Predictor = predictor,
        tGAM_Threshold = thr
      )
    }
  }
  
  # --- B) GAM: robust derivative zero-crossings
  if (identical(model_type, "GAM")) {
    cr <- robust_gam_crossings(model, predictor, n = 300)
    if (!is.null(cr)) {
      gam_crossings_list[[model_name]] <- cr %>%
        mutate(
          Model = model_name,
          Response = response,
          Predictor = predictor
        )
    }
  }
}

# Bind with safety (empty -> 0-row tibble with expected cols)
crossings_df <- if (length(gam_crossings_list)) {
  bind_rows(gam_crossings_list) %>%
    select(Model, Response, Predictor, Crossing_Index, Derivative_Zero_Crossing) %>%
    arrange(Response, Predictor, Crossing_Index)
} else {
  tibble(Model = character(), Response = character(), Predictor = character(),
         Crossing_Index = integer(), Derivative_Zero_Crossing = numeric())
}

threshold_df <- if (length(tgam_threshold_list)) {
  bind_rows(tgam_threshold_list) %>%
    arrange(Response, Predictor)
} else {
  tibble(Model = character(), Response = character(), Predictor = character(),
         tGAM_Threshold = numeric())
}

# Unified table (one row per model; crossings collapsed)
thresholds_all_df <- full_join(
  crossings_df %>%
    group_by(Model, Response, Predictor) %>%
    summarise(Derivative_Zero_Crossing = paste(signif(Derivative_Zero_Crossing, 4), collapse = ", "),
              .groups = "drop"),
  threshold_df,
  by = c("Model", "Response", "Predictor")
) %>%
  arrange(Response, Predictor)

print(thresholds_all_df)

# Fill missing entries with NA (for models that are GAM-only or TGAM-only)
thresholds_all_df <- thresholds_all_df %>%
  arrange(Response, Predictor)

print(thresholds_all_df)
# # Derivative zero-crossings for GAMs (unchanged)
# crossings_list <- list()
# 
# for (model_name in names(model_list)) {
#   if (grepl("_GAM$", model_name)) {
#     model <- model_list[[model_name]]
#     parts <- strsplit(model_name, "_vs_")[[1]]
#     response <- parts[1]
#     predictor <- sub("_GAM$", "", parts[2])
#     term_name <- paste0("s(", predictor, ")")
#     
#     deriv <- try(derivatives(model, term = term_name, partial_match = TRUE), silent = TRUE)
#     if (inherits(deriv, "try-error")) next
#     
#     dvals <- deriv$.derivative
#     xvals <- deriv[[predictor]]
#     sign_change_idx <- which(diff(sign(dvals)) != 0)
#     crossings <- numeric(0)
#     for (i in seq_along(sign_change_idx)) {
#       idx <- sign_change_idx[i]
#       x1 <- xvals[idx]; x2 <- xvals[idx + 1]
#       y1 <- dvals[idx]; y2 <- dvals[idx + 1]
#       crossings <- c(crossings, x1 - y1 * (x2 - x1) / (y2 - y1))
#     }
#     crossings_list[[model_name]] <- crossings
#   }
# }
# 
# crossings_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(crossings_list), function(name) {
#   crossings <- crossings_list[[name]]
#   if (length(crossings) > 0) {
#     data.frame(
#       Model = name,
#       Crossing_Index = seq_along(crossings),
#       Predictor_Zero_Crossing = crossings
#     )
#   } else NULL
# }))
# 
# if (!is.null(crossings_df)) print(crossings_df)
# 
# # Thresholds for tGAMs
# threshold_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(model_list), function(name) {
#   if (!grepl("_TGAM$", name)) return(NULL)
#   thr <- attr(model_list[[name]], "threshold")
#   if (is.null(thr) || !is.finite(thr)) return(NULL)
#   data.frame(Model = name, Threshold = thr)
# }))
# 
# if (!is.null(threshold_df)) print(threshold_df)

```
#Step 5a. Plotting tGAM
```{r}

```


#Step 5. Plotting GAM & tGam
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

plot_list <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(model_selection))) {
  row <- model_selection[i, ]
  response <- row$Response
  predictor <- row$Predictor
  model_type <- row$Model_Type
  full_model_name <- paste0(response, "_vs_", predictor, "_", model_type)
  model <- model_list[[full_model_name]]
  if (is.null(model)) next
  
  if (model_type %in% c("GAM", "TGAM")) {
    # Build prediction grid
    x_min <- min(model$model[[predictor]], na.rm = TRUE)
    x_max <- max(model$model[[predictor]], na.rm = TRUE)
    pred_vals <- seq(x_min, x_max, length.out = 200)
    pred_df <- setNames(data.frame(pred_vals), predictor)
    
    # If TGAM, add hinge var using the chosen threshold
    if (model_type == "TGAM") {
      thr <- attr(model, "threshold")
      pred_df$hinge <- pmax(0, pred_df[[predictor]] - thr)
    }
    
    # Predict on response scale with approximate CI
    pred_df$fit <- predict(model, newdata = pred_df, type = "response")
    pred_conf <- predict(model, newdata = pred_df, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)
    pred_df$se <- pred_conf$se.fit
    # transform link +/- 1.96*se to response scale
    pred_df$upper <- model$family$linkinv(pred_conf$fit + 1.96 * pred_df$se)
    pred_df$lower <- model$family$linkinv(pred_conf$fit - 1.96 * pred_df$se)
    
    # Base plot
    p <- ggplot() +
      geom_point(data = model$model, aes_string(x = predictor, y = response), alpha = 0.5) +
      geom_line(data = pred_df, aes_string(x = predictor, y = "fit"), color = "black", size = 1) +
      geom_ribbon(data = pred_df, aes_string(x = predictor, ymin = "lower", ymax = "upper"),
                  fill = "black", alpha = 0.2) +
      labs(x = predictor, y = response) +
      theme_minimal()
    
    # Add derivative zero-crossings (GAM) or threshold (TGAM)
    if (model_type == "GAM" && exists("crossings_df") && !is.null(crossings_df)) {
      crossings <- crossings_df$Predictor_Zero_Crossing[crossings_df$Model == full_model_name]
      if (length(crossings) > 0) {
        for (v in crossings) {
          p <- p + geom_vline(xintercept = v, linetype = "dashed", color = "red")
        }
      }
    } else if (model_type == "TGAM") {
      thr <- attr(model, "threshold")
      if (is.finite(thr)) {
        p <- p + geom_vline(xintercept = thr, linetype = "dashed", color = "red")
      }
    }
    
  } else if (model_type == "GLM") {
    df <- model$model
    df$fit <- fitted(model)
    df$se  <- sqrt(model$scale) * predict(model, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)$se.fit
    df$upper <- df$fit + df$se
    df$lower <- df$fit - df$se
    
    p <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x = predictor, y = response)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
      geom_line(aes(y = fit), color = "blue", size = 1) +
      geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), fill = "blue", alpha = 0.2) +
      labs(x = predictor, y = response) +
      theme_minimal()
  }
  
  plot_list[[full_model_name]] <- p
}

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 4)
print(combined_plot)

```
 
# Step 6. Save results
```{r}
# ---- Step 6: Save all results ----
library(dplyr)
library(readr)   # for write_csv
library(here)
#set region
region<-"4X"

# Ensure output folders exist
dir.create(here::here("results"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(here::here("figures"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Region fallback if not defined
if (!exists("region")) region <- "unknown"

# 1) Save a single .RData containing everything useful
rdata_path <- here::here("results", paste0("ei_threshold_results_", region, ".RData"))
save(
  best_models_table,     # thresholds + crossings per best model
  model_selection,       # per-pair best model (GLM/GAM/TGAM)
  comparison_results,    # diagnostics for all fitted models
  threshold_df,          # thresholds for all TGAMs (if any)
  crossings_df,          # zero-crossings for all GAMs (if any)
  model_list,            # the actual fitted model objects
  file = rdata_path
)
message("Saved .RData: ", rdata_path)

# 2) Save tables individually as CSVs for quick inspection (if objects exist)
# csv_safe_write <- function(obj, path) {
#   if (!is.null(obj) && inherits(obj, c("data.frame", "tbl_df")) && nrow(obj) > 0) {
#     readr::write_csv(obj, path)
#     message("Saved CSV: ", path)
#   } else {
#     message("Skipped CSV (empty or missing): ", path)
#   }
# }
# 
# csv_safe_write(best_models_table, here::here("tables", paste0("best_models_table_", region, ".csv")))
# csv_safe_write(model_selection,   here::here("tables", paste0("model_selection_", region, ".csv")))
# csv_safe_write(comparison_results,here::here("tables", paste0("comparison_results_", region, ".csv")))
# csv_safe_write(threshold_df,      here::here("tables", paste0("thresholds_tgam_", region, ".csv")))
# csv_safe_write(crossings_df,      here::here("tables", paste0("zero_crossings_gam_", region, ".csv")))

# # 3) Optional: also save just the best_models_table as an .rds
# rds_path <- here::here("data", paste0("ei_threshold_results_table_", region, ".rds"))
# saveRDS(best_models_table, file = rds_path)
# message("Saved .rds: ", rds_path)
# 
# # 4) Optional: save the combined plot if it exists
# if (exists("combined_plot")) {
#   png_path <- here::here("figures", paste0("nafo_combined_", region, ".png"))
#   pdf_path <- here::here("figures", paste0("nafo_combined_", region, ".pdf"))
#   ggplot2::ggsave(filename = png_path, plot = combined_plot,
#                   width = 16, height = 12, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg = "white")
#   ggplot2::ggsave(filename = pdf_path, plot = combined_plot,
#                   width = 16, height = 12, units = "in", device = cairo_pdf)
#   message("Saved figures: ", png_path, " and ", pdf_path)
# }
# 
# # 5) Optional: write a compact README-style log to help track what was saved
# log_lines <- c(
#   paste0("Region: ", region),
#   paste0("Timestamp: ", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z")),
#   paste0("RData: ", rdata_path),
#   paste0("Tables CSV folder: ", here::here("tables")),
#   paste0("Figures folder: ", here::here("figures")),
#   paste0("Rows | best_models_table: ", if (exists("best_models_table")) nrow(best_models_table) else 0),
#   paste0("Rows | model_selection: ",   if (exists("model_selection")) nrow(model_selection) else 0),
#   paste0("Rows | comparison_results: ",if (exists("comparison_results")) nrow(comparison_results) else 0),
#   paste0("Rows | threshold_df: ",      if (exists("threshold_df") && !is.null(threshold_df)) nrow(threshold_df) else 0),
#   paste0("Rows | crossings_df: ",      if (exists("crossings_df") && !is.null(crossings_df)) nrow(crossings_df) else 0)
# )
# writeLines(log_lines, con = here::here("data", paste0("save_log_", region, ".txt")))
# message("Wrote save log to: ", here::here("data", paste0("save_log_", region, ".txt")))

# File name (e.g., figures/nafo_combined_<region>.png)
png_path <- here::here("figures", paste0("nafo_combined_", region, ".png"))

# Save combined plot (adjust width/height as needed)
ggsave(
  filename = png_path,
  plot = combined_plot,
  width = 16, height = 12, units = "in", dpi = 600, bg = "white"
)
```
